 Dimension of arrays:
   k-Points           NKPTS =    256   number of bands    NBANDS=     36
   number of dos      NEDOS =    301   number of ions     NIONS =      1
   non local maximal  LDIM  =      4   non local SUM 2l+1 LMDIM =      8
   total plane-waves  NPLWV =   5832
   max r-space proj   IRMAX =      1   max aug-charges    IRDMAX=  13978
   dimension x,y,z NGX =    18 NGY =   18 NGZ =   18
   dimension x,y,z NGXF=    36 NGYF=   36 NGZF=   36
   support grid    NGXF=    36 NGYF=   36 NGZF=   36
   ions per type =               1
 NGX,Y,Z   is equivalent  to a cutoff of  10.48, 10.48, 10.48 a.u.
 NGXF,Y,Z  is equivalent  to a cutoff of  20.96, 20.96, 20.96 a.u.


 I would recommend the setting:
   dimension x,y,z NGX =    17 NGY =   17 NGZ =   17
 SYSTEM =  Al                                      
 POSCAR =  FCC Aluminum                            

 Startparameter for this run:
   NWRITE =      2    write-flag & timer
   PREC   = accura    medium, high low
   ISTART =      0    job   : 0-new  1-cont  2-samecut
   ICHARG =      2    charge: 1-file 2-atom 10-const
   ISPIN  =      2    spin polarized calculation?
   LNONCOLLINEAR =      F non collinear calculations
   LSORBIT =      F    spin-orbit coupling
   INIWAV =      1    electr: 0-lowe 1-rand  2-diag
   LASPH  =      F    aspherical Exc in radial PAW
   METAGGA=      F    non-selfconsistent MetaGGA calc.

   ENCUT  =  336.4 eV  24.73 Ry    4.97 a.u.   4.27  4.27  4.27*2*pi/ulx,y,z

   ROPT   =    0.00000

   EDIFFG = 0.1E-04   stopping-criterion for IOM
   NSW    =     51    number of steps for IOM
   NBLOCK =      1;   KBLOCK =     51    inner block; outer block

   NFREE  =      1    steps in history (QN), initial steepest desc. (CG)

   ISYM   =      2    0-nonsym 1-usesym 2-fastsym
   LCORR  =      T    Harris-Foulkes like correction to forces

   POTIM  =   0.50    time-step for ionic-motion

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


 conjugate gradient relaxation of ions
 charge density will be updated during run
 spin polarized calculation
 Variant of blocked Davidson
 Davidson routine will perform the subspace rotation
 performe sub-space diagonalisation
    after iterative eigenvector-optimisation
 modified Broyden-mixing scheme, WC =      100.0
 initial mixing is a Kerker type mixing with AMIX =  0.4000 and BMIX =      1.0000
 Hartree-type preconditioning will be used
 using additional bands           34
 reciprocal scheme for non local part
 use partial core corrections
 calculate Harris-corrections to forces 
   (improved forces if not selfconsistent)
 use gradient corrections 
 use of overlap-Matrix (Vanderbilt PP)
 Methfessel and Paxton  Order N= 1 SIGMA  =   0.10
